description: Orient to the current project position and determine the next steps.
outputs: Project orientation and next-step guidance

description: Generate the static Excalidraw diagram of the CPM Cinematics-as-Code methodology.
outputs: Methodology .excalidraw diagram

description: Generate and maintain the living Excalidraw diagram of the current production state.
outputs: Diagrams/production-flow.excalidraw

description: Summarize production progress — scenes, shards, and what to do next — from the Slate.
outputs: Production status report

description: Read project state and hand off to the right specialist agent or workflow.
outputs: Routing decision with rationale

description: Review a scene for thematic alignment and break it into atomic beats, producing Showrunner Notes.
outputs: Showrunner Notes with atomic beat breakdown

description: Extract and sharpen the pre-authored beat for the current shard, producing its Showrunner Notes.
outputs: Current beat Showrunner Notes

description: Track narrative contracts through the Plant, Maintain, and Payoff lifecycle.
outputs: Narrative contract records and status

description: Answer story, character, and world questions from canonical Show Bible content.
outputs: Canonical answer grounded in the Show Bible

description: Architect the full visual specification for one beat — lighting, lens, color, and composition.
outputs: Cinematographer Specs (visual architecture)

description: Answer a visual-language question with the canonical Style Guide rule and its rationale.
outputs: Style Guide rule with rationale

description: Scan a draft prompt for banned words and missing required terms.
outputs: Vocabulary audit report

description: Validate shard continuity, inject missing character state, define the handshake, and halt on failure.
outputs: Continuity status (PASS/INJECT/FAIL), injected state, and handshake definition

description: Verify the prior shard entry contract was honored by the current shard.
outputs: Handshake verification report (honored or violated)

description: Update a character file with new mutable state and append a version-history row.
outputs: Updated character file with version-history row

description: Synthesize the Showrunner, Cinematographer, and Script Supervisor outputs into a final AI video prompt.
outputs: Compiled prompt with Build Notes

description: Audit an existing draft prompt for anchoring, vocabulary, exit hooks, and injections.
outputs: Compliance report (PASS or FAIL) with fixes

description: Compile a prompt for a 5s, 15s, or 30s shard with scaled choreography.
outputs: Scaled compiled prompt with Build Notes

description: Run a vision interview and scaffold a new project with draft Show Bible, Style Guide, and characters.
outputs: Project scaffold, draft Show Bible, draft Style Guide, draft characters, methodology diagram

description: Extend existing inception drafts with deeper conversation or add missed phases.
outputs: Updated draft artifacts and memlog entries

description: Grade foundation readiness — artifact presence, draft honesty, and structural validity.
outputs: Readiness verdict (READY or ON HOLD) with per-artifact report

description: Scaffold a new CPM production project — directory tree, config, manifest, slate, and methodology diagram.
args: {project_name: film or series name}|{model_target: e.g. sora/kling/runway/pika}|{shard_duration: 5/15/30}|{-location: custom path}
outputs: New project tree with .cpm/config.yaml, manifest, Slate, and methodology diagram

description: Repair missing scaffolding or reconfigure project settings without touching creative content.
outputs: Updated scaffolding files and created missing directories

description: Check that an existing project is structurally complete and production-ready.
outputs: Validation report (pass or hold) with blocking issues

description: Author a new Show Bible — logline, pillars, world rules, arcs, and motifs — via filmmaker dialogue.
outputs: Show_Bible.md with all narrative-DNA sections

description: Revise sections of an existing Show Bible, surfacing conflicts with prior decisions first.
outputs: Updated Show_Bible.md and memlog entries

description: Grade an existing Show Bible against the contract for completeness and substance.
outputs: Validation verdict (PASS, HOLD with gaps, or NO BIBLE)

description: Define a production visual language and write the four architecture files.
outputs: Style_Guide.md, Palette.md, Lens_Language.md, Vocabulary.md

description: Revise or extend an existing style guide, surfacing conflicts and applying changes across files.
outputs: Updated architecture files and memlog entries

description: Grade a style guide for completeness, exact hex codes, and banned/required word lists.
outputs: Validation report (PASS or HOLD) with gaps

description: Create a new character with a full visual-identity interview capturing immutable LEFT/RIGHT features.
outputs: Character file, roster entry, and decision trail

description: Update an existing character with mutable state changes and append a version-history row.
outputs: Updated character file with version-history row

description: Grade a character file against the contract and confirm continuity-ready status.
outputs: Validation report (pass or hold)

description: Author a new scene brief with filmmaker-directed beats, setting, characters, and purpose.
outputs: scene-brief.md, entry contract, manifest registration, and Slate update

description: Revise an existing scene brief — setting, characters, beats, durations, or narrative.
outputs: Updated scene-brief.md, manifest and Slate updates

description: Grade a scene brief for structural completeness, beat specificity, and production readiness.
outputs: Validation report (PASS, PASS WITH WARNINGS, or HOLD)

description: Run the Four-Agent Ritual to generate one continuity-safe AI video prompt and exit state for a beat.
outputs: Shard prompt, exit state, and manifest and Slate updates

description: Re-run the ritual to overwrite an already-generated beat prompt and exit state.
outputs: Overwritten shard prompt and exit state; downstream shards invalidated

description: Grade an already-generated shard for continuity safety and structural completeness.
outputs: Validation report (PASS, PASS WITH WARNINGS, or HOLD)

description: Grade one shard boundary on five continuity criteria plus the MUST-NOT-Show floor.
args: {scene: zero-padded scene number}|{shard: shard A number}
outputs: Single-boundary test report (PASS or FAIL)

description: Chain handshake tests across a scene for the three-consecutive-pass verdict.
outputs: Scene validation report (VALIDATED or NOT VALIDATED)
